items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Progress checkpoints and completion criteria', but the evidence provided does not include any specific checks or validations related to this requirement. The prior steps focus on other aspects of the saga lifecycle without addressing the explicit need for progress checkpoints or completion criteria. Therefore, without concrete evidence to confirm or deny the coverage of this requirement, the validation is blocked and deemed inconclusive.
